allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const keys=['DATABASE_URL','AUTH_SECRET','NVIDIA_API_KEY','PEXELS_API_KEY','UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY','R2_ACCOUNT_ID','R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID','R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY','R2_BUCKET','R2_PUBLIC_BASE_URL']; for \(const k of keys\){const v=process.env[k]||''; const ok = v && !v.includes\('xxx'\) && v!=='postgres://user:pass@host/db?sslmode=require'; console.log\(k.padEnd\(24\), ok?'set':'MISSING/PLACEHOLDER', '\(len '+v.length+'\)'\);}; console.log\(\); console.log\('AUTH_SECRET length OK?', \(process.env.AUTH_SECRET||''\).length>=32 ? 'yes':'NO — must be >=32 chars'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const url=process.env.DATABASE_URL||''; const sec=process.env.AUTH_SECRET||''; console.log\('DATABASE_URL  len',url.length,'host=',url.replace\(/.*@/,''\).split\('/'\)[0].split\('?'\)[0]||'\(none\)'\); console.log\('AUTH_SECRET   len',sec.length,'>=32?',sec.length>=32\);")
